issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (when this character battles), not 'Activated'
Condition is 'Always' but should check if this character is battling opponent's character
Action is 'Rest' but should be no action—'set this card as active' means the card becomes active (opposite of rested state). This is a state change, not a Rest action
Text contains '[Your Turn]' which indicates duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not missing

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Once Per Turn] [Your Turn] If this Character battles your opponent's Character, set this card as active.
